name: Status Bar
title: Status Bar
intro: The status bar is displayed at the bottom of the application window. To display or hide the status bar, use the command Status Bar in the menu View. The right areas of the status bar indicate which of the following keys are latched down:
The Caps Lock key is latched down.
The Num Lock key is latched down.
The Scroll Lock key is latched down.
intro_tables: The Caps Lock key is latched down.
The Num Lock key is latched down.
The Scroll Lock key is latched down.
